title: dorstenia riedeliana
intro: Dorstenia riedeliana, also known as Riedel's Leather Flower or Riedel's Tree Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The leaves and roots of Dorstenia riedeliana have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a decoction or infusion, or applied topically as a poultice or salve to treat skin conditions and wounds.
